scripts.build:render: npm install --include=dev && npm run build --workspace=@estays/shared && npm run build --workspace=@estays/logger && npm run generate --workspace=@estays/database && npm run build --workspace=@estays/database && npm run build --workspace=@estays/api && node -e "require('@estays/shared'); require('@estays/logger'); require('@estays/database'); console.log('Workspace packages resolve to compiled JS OK')"
